faqs.question: Why are centipedes so common in Island Park homes?
faqs.answer: Island Park's waterfront location, high water table, and humid coastal climate create perfect conditions for centipedes. These pests are attracted to moisture in basements, crawl spaces, and around foundation areas, which are particularly common in Island Park's canal-front and beach-adjacent properties.
